Implemented the ARC2 task package for `aa18de87` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa18de87/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa18de87/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_aa18de87/generator.py). The rule is: for each row, fill color `2` across the horizontal span between the leftmost and rightmost nonzero markers, preserving the original markers. The summary hint was used, because it matched all official examples.

The generator is built around the observed latent structure instead of arbitrary row noise: it samples one connected same-color union of 2-4 diagonal 45-degree segments, mostly converging wedges with optional short outer spurs, with sizes tightened to the official family (`3-5` rows, `8-12` columns, no vertical padding). No new shared primitive was needed.
